children.name: Stop paying per booking. Own your agency's entire travel platform.
children.characters: Stop paying per booking. Own your agency's entire travel platform.

children.name: MaqsoodTravel gives IATA-certified travel agencies a fully branded booking platform. Multi-source search across Sabre, Amadeus and Travelport, zero per-booking fees, and complete ownership of your inventory. Your agents. Your clients. Your system.
children.characters: MaqsoodTravel gives IATA-certified travel agencies a fully branded booking platform. Multi-source search across Sabre, Amadeus and Travelport, zero per-booking fees, and complete ownership of your inventory. Your agents. Your clients. Your system.

children.name: Agencies save an average of £1,800/month in platform fee within their first month of going live.
children.characters: Agencies save an average of £1,800/month in platform fee within their first month of going live.
